venues.name: Up South
venues.description: TikTok's favorite Sydney cafe of 2024! The matcha croissants and pistachio treats here have broken the internet. Lines wrap around the block, but everyone agrees it's worth the wait.
venues.mustTry: Iced Strawberry Matcha, Iced Pistachio Matcha, matcha croissant, pistachio croissant (the crookie!)

venues.name: Cafe Margaret
venues.description: Neil Perry's latest transformation in Double Bay. From 7am daily, serving elevated cafe fare plus the famous burger that ranked in the World's Best list.
venues.mustTry: Four-cheese toastie, the famed Next Door burger, bacon and egg roll

venues.name: Speedos Cafe
venues.description: Sydney's most famous cafe at Bondi Beach. The tiramisu latte is the best in Sydney, and the viral egg sandwich keeps people coming back.
venues.mustTry: Tiramisu latte ($12), acai bowl ($21), viral egg sandwich ($20)

venues.name: Chubby Cubby
venues.description: The best matcha in Sydney according to viral TikToks. About to drop a whole new matcha and shokupan menu that's already generating massive hype.
venues.mustTry: Signature matcha drinks, Japanese shokupan (milk bread), matcha latte

venues.name: Circa Espresso
venues.description: Winner of Time Out's People's Choice Award for Best Cafe 2025. The Ottoman eggs have achieved cult status and put Parramatta on the breakfast map.
venues.mustTry: Ottoman eggs (creamy garlic labne, fried eggplant, chilli oil, crisp leeks, poached eggs), in-house roasted coffee

venues.name: Baking 101
venues.description: Home to 2025's It Baked Good: the cinnamon scroll that sold out in three hours. Classic, unhurried vibes with red curtains, chandeliers, and piano jazz.
venues.mustTry: Signature cinnamon scroll with vanilla cream, Scent of Stanmore carrot cake

venues.name: Bote
venues.description: Breezy Northern Beaches vibes on the water. Coffee from Mecca, pastries from Staple, cookies from Butter Boy. Dogs and families welcome.
venues.mustTry: Coffee and pastries on the deck, feet dangling over the water

venues.name: Happyfield
venues.description: Bright yellow corner cafe bringing Canadian-style pancakes to Sydney's Italian heartland. From ex-Grounds team, serving proper North American diner vibes.
venues.mustTry: Canadian pancake stacks with 100% maple syrup, breakfast platter for two, coddled eggs, soft-serve acai sundae

venues.name: Manteiga
venues.description: Portuguese-inspired spot from former Bentley and Dinner by Heston chef. Family recipes meet elevated cafe culture.
venues.mustTry: Manteiga Muffin (Bolos Lêvedos from grandfather's recipe), soft eggs with double-smoked bacon

venues.name: Cafe Cressida
venues.description: From the Ursula's team: daytime eating with a cheffy edge. Beautiful courtyard space serving elevated classics from breakfast through dinner.
venues.mustTry: Gruyere toastie on Iggy's bread, silky scrambles with bacon, French toast, prawn cocktail toasts
